scenarios.query: What is the correct plugin initialization order? I want to add a new hook.
scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent references the Plugin Load Order section (10-step sequence). Identifies that hooks are registered in step 7 (Create Hook Factories) and wired in steps 8-9. Notes that DelegationManager and LifecycleManager must be initialized before hooks (steps 3-6). Provides the hook registration contract: hooks are read-side/guard-side only, mutations go through managers.
pass_criteria: Notes DelegationManager comes before LifecycleManager (step 3 before step 5)
Identifies hooks as step 7 (after core engine init)
References hook composition rules (read-side only, mutations through managers)
scenarios.grading: PASS if ≥4 criteria met; FAIL otherwise

scenarios.query: Why is my delegated session stuck in 'running' phase and never completes?
scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent references the Completion Detection Protocol section. Explains the dual-signal model: (1) session.idle event + (2) 10-second stability timer. Both must fire. If stuck, checks: did session.idle fire? Is the stability timer running? Notes default 30-minute watch timeout as safety net. Suggests checking feedMessageCount() calls and the stability timeout configuration.
pass_criteria: Notes 30-minute watch timeout as safety net
Explains that both signals must fire for completion
Suggests diagnostic: check if session.idle events are being received
scenarios.grading: PASS if ≥4 criteria met; FAIL otherwise

scenarios.query: How many concurrent delegations can I make, and what happens if I exceed the limit?
scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent references the Concurrency Model section. Reports default limit of 3 per key (`DEFAULT_CONCURRENCY_LIMIT`). Explains keyed semaphore with optional acquire timeout. If limit exceeded: acquire queues in FIFO order (with high/normal priority). If acquireTimeoutMs is set, rejects with [Harness] error after timeout. If not set, waits indefinitely. Also notes MAX_DELEGATION_DEPTH of 3 for nesting.
scenarios.grading: PASS if ≥4 criteria met; FAIL otherwise
